overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a wizard student exploring a gothic castle interior, ascending grand staircases, passing monumental statues, and entering a vast candlelit great hall with enchanted ceiling.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow gothic corridor with vaulted ceilings and wall tapestries, then begins ascending a grand stone staircase illuminated by fire sconces.

segments.scene_description: At the top of the stairs, the character explores a landing featuring a massive bronze statue of a wizard with a griffin, then circles around it to enter a new corridor where another student walks past.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide hall lined with four massive statues of house founders in niches, walking past stone pillars and house banners toward large wooden doors while other students converse nearby.

segments.scene_description: The character opens the large doors and enters the magnificent Great Hall, where thousands of floating candles illuminate the space beneath an enchanted ceiling showing the night sky, with house tables and a large fireplace visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, shadowed corridors of a gothic castle into the vast, luminous expanse of a magical great hall. It begins by traversing a narrow vaulted corridor adorned with tapestries before ascending a grand stone staircase lit by flickering fire sconces. As the camera reaches the landing, it circles a massive bronze statue of a wizard and griffin, transitioning through a secondary corridor where another student passes by. The scene then expands into a wide hall lined with monumental statues of house founders and hanging banners, moving past stone pillars and chatting students toward a set of imposing wooden doors. Finally, the doors swing open to reveal the magnificent Great Hall, where the space opens up beneath an enchanted night sky ceiling illuminated by thousands of floating candles.
